content.text:
[Tue 2026-04-14 01:46 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: You are senior-backend. Test Module 1: AUTH API for ahv-dtlx-backend.

## Context
- Workspace: /root/.openclaw/workspaces/ahv-driving-training-system/ahv-dtlx-backend
- Server port: 5555
- Label: dtlx:auth-test

## Steps

### 1. Setup
- cd /root/.openclaw/workspaces/ahv-driving-training-system/ahv-dtlx-backend
- cp .env.example .env  (if .env doesn't exist)
- Run: yarn seed  (seeds admin account admin123@gmail.com / 123456)
- Start server: yarn dev  (background)
- Wait for server to start (look for "listening" or "started")

### 2. Test AUTH endpoints (PUBLIC - no token needed)
Use curl to test each endpoint:

```
POST /api/v1/auth/login
Body: { "email": "admin123@gmail.com", "password": "123456" }
Expected: JWT token

POST /api/v1/auth/register  
Body: { "email": "test@test.com", "password": "123456", "name": "Test User" }
Expected: user created

GET /api/v1/auth/me
Expected: current user info (if authenticated)

POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password
Body: { "email": "admin123@gmail.com" }

POST /api/v1/auth/refresh
```

### 3. After login success
- Save the JWT token from login response
- Test GET /api/v1/auth/me with the token (Authorization: Bearer <token>)

### 4. Report
For EACH endpoint, report:
- ✅ /api/v1/auth/xxx — HTTP status, response (truncated if long)
- ❌ /api/v1/auth/xxx — HTTP status, error message

## Rules
- Read-only API testing
- NEVER push or commit code
- Kill background server when done
